mapper.sql: package_id AS packageId, package_version AS packageVersion, resource_path AS resourcePath, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(executable_json, '$.toolId')) AS toolId, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(executable_json, '$.interpreter')) AS interpreter, COALESCE( CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(executable_json, '$.argumentSchema') AS CHAR), '{}' ) AS argumentSchemaJson, COALESCE( JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(executable_json, '$.sideEffectClass')), 'UNKNOWN' ) AS sideEffectClass, content_text AS contentText
mapper.select: SELECT FROM skill_resource WHERE resource_type = 'SCRIPT' AND executable_json IS NOT NULL ORDER BY package_id, package_version, resource_path
SELECT FROM skill_resource WHERE resource_type = 'SCRIPT' AND executable_json IS NOT NULL AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(executable_json, '$.toolId')) = #{toolId} ORDER BY package_version DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(conversation_id) FROM job WHERE id = #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS id, tool_id AS toolId, status, CAST(result_json AS CHAR) AS resultJson, error_message AS errorMessage FROM tool_invocation WHERE idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tool_invocation ( id, job_id, task_id, task_run_id, loop_run_id, loop_node_id, tool_id, tool_type, idempotency_key, arguments_json, status ) VALUES ( #{invocationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{taskId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{loopRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{toolId}, #{toolType}, #{idempotencyKey}, CAST(#{argumentsJson} AS JSON), 'PENDING' )
mapper.update: UPDATE tool_invocation SET status = 'RUNNING', started_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{invocationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE tool_invocation SET status = 'COMPLETED', result_json = CAST(#{resultJson} AS JSON), completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{invocationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE tool_invocation SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, result_json = CAST(#{resultJson} AS JSON), completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{invocationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING')
